subject: Fw: cabinetmaker
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: "Johanna MIKX" <alberto.pinto@albertopinto.com>

Date: Wed, 26 Sep 2007 15:11:08 
To:<kellens@earthlink.net>
Subject: cabinetmaker


Dear Jeffrey, 
  
I was very glad to have you on the phone yesterday. I am really sorry about what is happening to you. 
You can always count on my friendship. 
Hope we  will meet each other next week when you are coming to France. 
We have problems with the lot of work we have , can you give me the address etc. of the cabinetmaker you told about on the phone, who was working on the isle? 
Alberto
